---
title: Workflow Analysis To Understand Ease of Preparation and Importation of 3D Exemplar Head Scan Data to 3D Modeling Software Programs for N95 Mask Sizing and Fit
date: '2022-01-01'
author: [Susan L Sokolowski, Yu Zou, Jake Searcy]
publication: International Textile and Apparel Association Annual Conference Proceedings, **1** (2022).
categories: [health]
url_source: 'https://www.iastatedigitalpress.com/itaa/article/id/13487/'
url_preprint: ''
journ: International Textile and Apparel Association Annual Conference Proceedings
issue: 1
page: ''
year: 2022
image: ''
pub_number: 7
---
